name: buildcalc-api
description: Vertical construction data API for AI agents and developers. 5 federated verticals (calculators, codes, costs, products, benchmarks) with ~105 MCP tools, grounded in U.S. federal sources (BLS / Census / EPA / ENERGY STAR / NFRC) + ICC-ES Evaluation Service Reports + manufacturer spec sheets. 96% certified-grade confidence.

authentication.description: Free-tier API key (1,000 requests/month) — sign up at the URL above. Paid tiers: Starter $49/mo (50k req), Growth $249/mo (500k req), Enterprise from $1.5k/mo.

categories: calculators (81 tools, 16 categories: concrete · framing · lumber · drywall · roofing · paint · flooring · hvac · insulation · masonry · electrical-NEC · plumbing-UPC-IPC · doors-windows-IECC · gutters · stairs-IRC · site · misc)
codes (5 tools: IRC/IBC/NEC/IECC/IPC section lookup with FTS, 937 sections, dual-edition 2021/2024)
costs (8 tools: BLS PPI materials, OEWS+QCEW labor wages, Census BPS permits)
products (6 tools: 43,400+ certified SKUs across 10 categories with JSONB spec filters)
benchmarks (4 tools: 15 standardized US residential project types × 5 geographies)
